name: @harmony/schema
description: Shared scene schema definitions for Harmony clients

scripts.build: pnpm run build:asset-types && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm run clean:generated
scripts.clean:generated: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const walk=(dir)=>{for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const full=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory()){if(entry.name==='dist') continue; walk(full);} else if(entry.isFile() && entry.name.endsWith('.js')){fs.rmSync(full,{force:true});}}};walk(root);"
scripts.check: pnpm run type-check && pnpm run type-check:asset-types
